chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-323 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objections. For hearing of M.A No.1718/21. For hearing of main case. 11.11.2021. Mr. Irfan Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. Advocate General, Sindh along with Mr. Shakeel Shaikh, Asst. Superintendent Central Jail Hyderabad. = After hearing the parties at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition and submits that he will avail the remedy before the Civil Court in accordance with law. Learned Addl. A.G has no objection. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed in the terms as stated above. JUDGE JUDGE *Hafiz Fahad*
